# Abu Al Island

**Summary**: A location on the Arabian Gulf coast where mangrove samples were collected.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] collected sediment and plant samples from Abu Ali Island.
